title: Update on the Electronic Questionnaire for Authorized Economic Operator Applications
bodyHtml:
The AEO Questionnaire has been updated to version 3.3.2. In this version:

In question 1.9 under "COMPANY INFORMATION," a new field titled "Is there a Type C Bonded Warehouse at the Facility?" has been added for each facility listed by the company.

Amendments have been made to remove the mandatory requirement to answer question 4.4 if the option "No external service is used for the archive" is selected under the "B. External Service for Archive" section in the "ARCHIVE SYSTEM" section.

Various questions that should have been closed but remained open in certain circumstances have been fixed.

Corrections have been made to questions where specifications such as Written Procedure Document, Paragraph/Article No, and Page No could not be specified.

Facilities to be specified under "Section 13" have been removed from the "Requests for Additional Permits and Authorizations" section.

The "Not Applicable" options for questions have been reviewed.

Authorization request checkboxes and explanations related to the authorized consignor authority have been removed in accordance with the Regulation Amending the Customs Regulation published in the Official Gazette dated September 24, 2021, and numbered 31608.

Various interactive form improvements and bug fixes have been implemented.

The number, content, title, or sequence of questions has not changed.

No questions have been removed.

For those who have previously filled out the questionnaire in version 3.3.1 but have not yet submitted their applications, it is possible to transfer their existing answers to the new version of the form by copying and pasting them into the corresponding fields in the new version.

Henceforth, new AEO applications submitted after April 5, 2024, must include the version 3.3.2 questionnaire, and versions 3.3.1 or older will not be accepted. However, AEO applications submitted before this date with version 3.3.1 questionnaires will be accepted, and there is no need to submit the new version questionnaire for these applications.

Click here to download the AEO Questionnaire version 3.3.2.
